summary: Iteration 11 - Fix validation + full P0/P1 module verification with real MongoDB Atlas data. 22/22 backend tests passed. Both new fixes confirmed working: (1) Salari anno filter uses 'anno' field returning 100 movimenti 2025; (2) Cedolini $or anno filter returns 15 cedolini 2026 and 253+ cedolini 2025. All P0/P1 modules verified with real data.

issues: React warning: missing unique 'key' prop in SupplierCard list render (Fornitori.jsx line ~920). Non-blocking, cosmetic warning only.

FIX_1_salari_anno_field.description: Prima Nota Salari filter now uses campo 'anno' (int) instead of 'data' (regex)
FIX_1_salari_anno_field.details: GET /api/prima-nota/salari?anno=2025 returns 100 movimenti (expected 64+). GET ?anno=2024 also returns data.

FIX_2_cedolini_anno_int_string.description: Cedolini anno filter uses $or [int, string] to handle both int(2026) and string('2026')
FIX_2_cedolini_anno_int_string.details: GET /api/cedolini?anno=2026 returns 15 cedolini. GET ?anno=2025 returns 253+ cedolini.

p0_p1_verification.prima_nota_cassa_2025: PASS - returns real movimenti, saldo positivo (~€359k)
p0_p1_verification.prima_nota_cassa_2026: PASS - 28 movimenti, saldo €14.361,17 visible on frontend

action_items: MINOR: Add unique 'key' prop to SupplierCard list in Fornitori.jsx (~line 920) to fix React warning
critical_code_review_comments: Both fixes correctly implemented: cedolini.py $or query at lines 191-192 and 618-619; salari.py 'anno' field at lines 33-34
Fornitori.jsx SupplierCard missing React key prop in list render - minor React warning, non-blocking

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 pages load correctly with real data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new fixes verified (iter 11): (1) salari anno filter returns 100 movimenti 2025 via 'anno' field; (2) cedolini $or filter returns 15/2026 and 253+/2025. All P0/P1 modules working with real Atlas data. Minor: Fornitori.jsx SupplierCard missing key prop (console warning only). Previous perf fixes from iter 10 still active (alert-limiti <3s, saldo-ferie <2s). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration11_fixes.py 22 tests.
rca_of_issue: FIX 1 (Salari): Records in prima_nota_salari collection store year in 'anno' integer field, not via date string regex. Previous filter used data regex (YYYY pattern) which failed to match int fields. Fix: query['anno'] = anno. FIX 2 (Cedolini): Records in cedolini collection have 'anno' stored as either int or string depending on import source. Previous filter used exact int match which missed string-stored records. Fix: $or query handles both types.
